zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Brereton於大約1288年出生在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓時，她的父親William of Brereton25歲，母親Rohese de Vernon8歲。她於大約1301年與Sir John Davenport在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國爾阿斯特伯里享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Brereton于大约1288年出生在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓时，她的父亲William of Brereton25岁，母亲Rohese de Vernon8岁。她于大约1301年与Sir John Davenport在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国爾阿斯特伯里享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Brereton was born about 1288, in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William of Brereton, was 25 and her mother, Rohese de Vernon, was 8. She married Sir John Davenport about 1301, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1350, in Astbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Brereton est née environ 1288, à Brereton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William of Brereton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Vernon, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Davenport environ 1301, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Brereton um 1288 in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William of Brereton 25 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Vernon 8. Sie hat um 1301 in England Sir John Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Astbury, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Brereton è nata il circa 1288 nel Brereton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William of Brereton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Vernon, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Davenport circa 1301, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Astbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Breretonが約1288年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトンで生まれた時，父William of Breretonは25歳，母Rohese de Vernonは8歳であった。約1301年にイギリスでSir John Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Brereton(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William of Brereton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Vernon(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 대략 1301년 영국에서 Sir John Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 체실르 애스트버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Brereton nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William of Brereton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Vernon, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Davenport aproximadamente 1301, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Brereton родилась около 1288 г. в местности бриретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William of Brereton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Vernon, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Davenport около 1301 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности астбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Brereton nació aproximadamente 1288, en Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William of Brereton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Rohese de Vernon, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Sir John Davenport aproximadamente 1301, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
